Access.title: Platform Access
Access.subtitle: Select the platform you want to access.
Access.lupsDesc: Manage your subscriptions, subscribers, recurring billing and logistics from your admin panel.
Access.fluxDesc: Advance your installment sales, manage payment processors and view your cash flow.
Access.lenndosDesc: Manage your credit portfolio, risk assessment and automated collections.
Access.tokeniDesc: Manage your payment token network, real-time transactions and digital wallets.

Home.heroSubtitle: We build modular technology that transforms complex financial systems into simple experiences. From real-time payments to subscriptions and credit.
Home.productsSubtitle: Four independent products that empower each other. Start with one, grow with all.
Home.ecosystemSubtitle: Tokeni is the engine powering the entire ecosystem. Each product connects to the core to deliver complete financial experiences.
Home.testimonialQuote: We built four products on Junngla's platform. The modularity and speed of their technology allowed us to innovate without limits.
Home.ctaTitle: Let's build the financial future together
Home.ctaSubtitle: Let's talk about how Junngla can empower your business.

Products.title: Our Products
Products.subtitle: An ecosystem of modular financial solutions. Each product solves a specific challenge, and together they create a complete platform.
Products.worksWithDesc: Enhance this product by combining it with other solutions from the Junngla ecosystem.

Tokeni.name: Tokeni
Tokeni.tagline: Transform complex financial systems into simple experiences
Tokeni.description: Modular financial transaction design core developed 100% by Junngla, capable of solving transaction processing and its derived needs.
Tokeni.heroDescription: Modular financial transaction design core developed 100% by Junngla, capable of solving transaction processing and its derived needs.
Tokeni.technologyDesc: Modular financial transaction design core developed 100% by Junngla (from scratch), capable of solving transaction processing and its derived needs.
Tokeni.integrationDesc: The different API-based modules allow you to create financial solutions for your clients by connecting to your systems, third-party products, and any ecosystem you need in a simple and secure way.
Tokeni.solutionDesc: The technology architecture and performance we have developed provide the speed and agility needed to manage daily operations and create new offerings in record time.
Tokeni.productsSubtitle: Specialized solutions that adapt to every need of the financial ecosystem.
Tokeni.product1Desc: Real-time payments and QR codes for merchants and end consumers. Process instant transactions with real-time settlement.
Tokeni.product2Desc: Instant person-to-person transfers and alias-based payments. Connect digital wallets in an interoperable network.
Tokeni.product3Desc: Native integration with public transportation systems for contactless payments, in partnership with government entities.
Tokeni.benefitsSubtitle: Tokeni drives your organization's growth across multiple dimensions.
Tokeni.benefit1Desc: Generate new revenue streams by enabling innovative financial products on our platform.
Tokeni.benefit2Desc: Compete on equal terms with major market players thanks to world-class technology.
Tokeni.benefit3Desc: Access segments and markets that were previously unreachable with flexible financial solutions.
Tokeni.valueProp1Desc: Minimize risk and time-to-market with proven, production-ready modules.
Tokeni.valueProp2Desc: Banking-grade security standards. Data and transaction protection at every layer.
Tokeni.valueProp3Desc: Pay-per-module model: pay only for what you need. Scale without hidden costs.
Tokeni.valueProp4Desc: The highest availability standards so your operations never stop.
Tokeni.caseStudyDesc: Chile's first interoperable electronic money movement network. A solution built on Tokeni that connects banks, digital wallets, and merchants in real time.
Tokeni.caseStudyProduct1Desc: Standardized QR code payments compatible with multiple issuers and acquirers.
Tokeni.caseStudyProduct2Desc: E-commerce and digital platform payments via interoperable alias.
Tokeni.caseStudyProduct3Desc: Person-to-person transfers between different wallets in real time.
Tokeni.caseStudyProduct4Desc: Transit fare payments with digital wallets in partnership with Chile's Ministry of Transport.
Tokeni.testimonialQuote: Thanks to the construction of RedPay in Chile, we have developed four products that allow connecting merchants and users through QR code payments, P2P, Alias, and even public transportation payments in partnership with Chile's Ministry of Transport.
Tokeni.servicesSubtitle: Tokeni adapts to the needs of different types of financial organizations.
Tokeni.ctaTitle: Let's build your next financial product together
Tokeni.ctaSubtitle: Let's talk about how Tokeni can transform your financial operations.

Lups.name: Lups
Lups.heroDescription: Create your own subscription platform for physical products and services. Automate billing, logistics, subscriber portal and complete white-label.
Lups.service1Desc: Automate recurring invoice billing for professional services, variable consumption or work hours.
Lups.service2Desc: Physical product subscriptions with integrated logistics: boxes, kits, auto-replenishment.
Lups.service3Desc: Membership and loyalty programs with exclusive benefits and automatic dues management.
Lups.service4Desc: Subscription model on your existing e-commerce with full digital onboarding.
Lups.featuresTitle: Everything you need to sell recurring
Lups.feature1Desc: Your logo, colors and custom domain. Subscribers feel they're interacting with your brand.
Lups.feature2Desc: Catalog with categories, packs, bulk CSV import, stock and inventory control.
Lups.feature3Desc: Weekly, monthly, quarterly or annual plans. Automatic upgrades, downgrades, pauses and cancellations.
Lups.feature4Desc: Branded portal where subscribers manage their subscription, payments and invoices.
Lups.feature5Desc: Automatic charges via OneClick and Webpay Plus with Transbank. Bank transfer available.
Lups.feature6Desc: Recurring order engine: successful charge automatically triggers the shipping order.
Lups.feature7Desc: Embeddable widget, flexible API, ERP connection (SAP, Oracle). 4 ways to integrate.
Lups.feature8Desc: Active subscriptions, renewals, cancellations, revenue by period and customer behavior.
Lups.dunningDesc: 48% of cancellations are due to payment failure, not customer choice. LupsDunning solves it automatically.
Lups.dunningPhase1Desc: Identifies error type in real time: insufficient funds, expired card or technical issue.
Lups.dunningPhase2Desc: Strategically spaced retries (days 1, 3 and 7) using machine learning.
Lups.dunningPhase3Desc: Automatic emails to customer with card update button. Instant reactivation.
Lups.pricingPlan1Desc: Ideal for businesses starting with subscriptions.
Lups.pricingPlan2Desc: For volume businesses. More competitive pricing at scale. Custom domain included.
Lups.pricingNote: LupsDunning included in all plans at no additional cost.
Lups.logisticsDesc: Delivery rules by area, differentiated costs and automatic shipment tracking.
Lups.useCase1Desc: Gourmet coffee, beauty products, wines: monthly delivery of curated products.
Lups.useCase2Desc: Medications, vitamins, diapers: your customers never run out.
Lups.useCase3Desc: Gyms, sports clubs, NGOs: complete recurring dues management.
Lups.useCase4Desc: Professional services, variable consumption, work hours: automate your billing.
Lups.ctaDesc: Create your free account and launch your subscription platform in days.

Flux.name: Flux
Flux.tagline: Your money, when you need it
Flux.heroDescription: Advance your installment sales, manage all your payment terminals from one place. No paperwork, no waiting.
Flux.valueProp1Desc: Turn your installment sales into immediate cash. Select which installments to advance and receive the money in your bank account.
Flux.valueProp2Desc: Create your account in 5 minutes, connect your payment processor and start advancing sales with no paperwork or waiting.
Flux.valueProp3Desc: See exactly how much you will receive before confirming. No fine print, no surprises.
Flux.dashboardDesc: View and manage Transbank, Getnet, BCI Pagos and Klap from a single place. Accumulated sales, account statements, settlements and advances in real time.
Flux.howItWorksStep1Desc: Sign up in 5 minutes with your business details. No paperwork or bank procedures.
Flux.howItWorksStep2Desc: Link Transbank or another compatible processor so we can see your installment sales.
Flux.howItWorksStep3Desc: Select the installments you want to advance and receive the money in your bank account.
Flux.creditGrowthTitle: Your credit line grows with you
Flux.creditGrowthDesc: Automatic monthly evaluation based on your business performance. No additional paperwork.
Flux.ctaDesc: Create your free account and start getting your money when you need it.

LenndOS.name: LenndOS
LenndOS.tagline: Core as a Service for credit operations
LenndOS.heroDescription: Modular credit core that enables originating, managing and collecting credits or credit lines across merchants, customers and individuals.
LenndOS.caasDesc: LenndOS is the credit operating system your organization needs. A modular core that adapts to your business model, not the other way around.
LenndOS.lifecycleDesc: From application to collection, LenndOS manages every stage of credit automatically.
LenndOS.lifecycle1Desc: Digital applicant onboarding with configurable forms.
LenndOS.lifecycle2Desc: Customizable scoring engine and risk rules.
LenndOS.lifecycle3Desc: Approval workflows with levels and automation.
LenndOS.lifecycle4Desc: Fund distribution integrated with payment methods.
LenndOS.lifecycle5Desc: Complete portfolio dashboard with real-time visibility.
LenndOS.feature1Desc: Evaluation and credit generation engine with configurable rules for each segment and product.
LenndOS.feature2Desc: Configurable scoring and credit evaluation models according to your institutional risk policy.
LenndOS.feature3Desc: Manage your credit portfolio with complete visibility of each operation's lifecycle.
LenndOS.feature4Desc: Automate the collection process with intelligent multi-channel workflows: email, SMS, calls.
LenndOS.feature5Desc: 100% RESTful API architecture for integration with your existing systems.
LenndOS.feature6Desc: Deploy the platform with your brand, colors and domain for your end customers.
LenndOS.feature7Desc: Dashboards and reports on portfolio, delinquency, recovery and projections.
LenndOS.feature8Desc: Designed to meet financial sector regulatory requirements in Chile and Latin America.
LenndOS.segmentsDesc: One system for all your credit products.
LenndOS.segment1Desc: Business credit, factoring and supplier financing.
LenndOS.segment2Desc: Consumer credit, personal loans and credit lines.
LenndOS.segment3Desc: Person-to-person loans with automated evaluation and collection.
LenndOS.segment4Desc: Instant credit at point of sale and digital platforms.
LenndOS.useCase1Desc: Complete credit cycle management for cooperatives looking to digitize. Clients like Libercoop and Coopeuch.
LenndOS.useCase2Desc: Credit infrastructure for startups and fintechs wanting to launch credit products without building tech from scratch.
LenndOS.useCase3Desc: Platform for companies providing credit to their customers or suppliers with comprehensive management.
LenndOS.useCase4Desc: Solution for organizations granting microcredits with simplified risk assessment and automated collection.
LenndOS.ctaDesc: Let's talk about how LenndOS can transform your credit business.

Services.title: Services
Services.subtitle: Beyond technology, we walk with you through the entire process.
Services.pmDesc: Dedicated Project Managers who lead implementation from start to finish.
Services.devDesc: Development team specialized in financial products and payment platforms.
Services.fieldDesc: On-site support for implementations requiring installation and training.
Services.step1Desc: We understand your business and define clear objectives.

About.title: About us
About.subtitle: We are a Chilean fintech that transforms complex financial systems into simple experiences.
About.story: Founded in 2019, Junngla was born with the mission of democratizing access to world-class financial technology. From Santiago, Chile, we build infrastructure that enables companies to create innovative financial products without building the technology from scratch.

Contact.title: Let's talk
Contact.subtitle: Tell us about your project and we'll show you how Junngla can help.
Contact.name: Name
Contact.success: Message sent. We'll contact you soon.
